uses.title: My Toolkit
uses.subtitle: The tools I use daily + how I use them to ship.

hero.title: My Toolkit
hero.subtitle: The tools I use in my daily workflow—and how I turn them into a repeatable build process. Not just a list: process, standards, and outcomes.

plan.title: Design & Planning
plan.description: I start by clarifying scope: screen flow, data model, and delivery criteria. Notes stay short; decisions stay traceable.

build.title: Implementation
build.description: I build with UI/UX accuracy, performance, and maintainability in mind—shipping reusable pieces instead of one-off code.

api.title: Backend & API
api.description: I define clear contracts (request/response), auth, and error scenarios. The goal is a simple, testable service layer.

ai.title: AI / Automation
ai.description: If computer vision or automation is needed, I validate with small PoCs first—then integrate behind clear API boundaries.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.description: I ship to production with a pragmatic setup: basic server config, reverse proxy, and TLS. Simple to operate, easy to maintain.

quality.title: Monitoring & Quality
quality.description: I make failures visible with meaningful logging and error handling. Changes stay small, reviewable, and measurable via feedback.

vcs.title: Version control strategy
vcs.description: A branch/PR flow keeps changes small and readable, with easy rollback when needed.

clean.title: Clean code & modular architecture
clean.description: Clear boundaries, testable modules, and simple responsibility mapping—so the codebase scales without chaos.

observability.title: Logging & error visibility
observability.description: I design where to log and where to catch errors so issues can be diagnosed fast.

security.title: Security (general)
security.description: I consider auth and baseline security practices, and plan safeguards like rate limiting for risky endpoints.

delivery.title: Documentation & delivery
delivery.description: Key decisions are documented briefly; handover includes clear setup and run instructions.

mobile.title: Mobile App Architecture
mobile.problem: As apps grow, state management, UI consistency, and integrations (push, auth) can become scattered and fragile.
mobile.approach: I modularize screens, keep state flows consistent, and make offline/online + notification flows explicit.

backend.title: Backend & API
backend.problem: Mismatch between client and API contracts, inconsistent error flows, and repetitive data-access code.
backend.approach: I keep the service layer simple, isolate data access, and standardize auth + error responses.

ai.title: AI / Computer Vision
ai.problem: Reliable integration for image understanding, detection/tracking, or automation workflows inside real products.
ai.approach: I validate with a small PoC, then bring it into production with clear performance and integration boundaries.

development.title: Development
development.why: A focused base set for fast iteration, reliable debugging, and reproducible setup.

mobileDevelopment.title: Mobile Development
mobileDevelopment.why: Tools that help me validate real device behavior and control platform specifics.

design.title: Design
design.why: To make flows and key UX decisions visible before writing code.

productivity.title: Productivity
productivity.why: To keep decisions, tasks, and communication in sync—so delivery stays predictable.

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.why: A multi-environment + real-device approach for compatibility and accurate testing.

finalCta.title: Want to build a system?
finalCta.subtitle: From idea to production, we can clarify the process together.
